attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.SHIFT_CONSTRUCT_ID, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.SHIFT_ID, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.UNIT_OF_TIME_VALUE, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.BEGIN_TIME, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.END_TIME, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.START_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.END_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.AVAILABILITY_TYPE_CODE, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.SECURITY_GROUP_ID, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS,
 (
select SHIFT_CONSTRUCT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS
minus
select SHIFT_CONSTRUCT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS
) ACM
where 
 ACM.SHIFT_CONSTRUCT_ID = STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.SHIFT_CONSTRUCT_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_JTF_CAL_SHIFT_CONSTRUCTS.REFRESH_DATETIME
